name: Senolytics safety-table follow-up extraction repair
summary: Adds full-text structured D+Q bone publication-table preferred-term adverse-event rows beyond headache, a registry/article discontinuation result, PubMed source-snapshot-backed IPF and AD-risk safety extraction, and a DKD abstract-limited safety record while keeping full article/table cross-human safety extraction gaps open.

scope.question: Repair the senolytics safety-table follow-up gap by adding event-specific D+Q bone adverse-event rows, discontinuation count fields, and source-snapshot-backed DKD, IPF, and AD-risk safety extraction where the retained sources support it.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded safety extraction-refresh repair candidate and required review lanes.
Refreshes the safety_durability coverage state after row-level D+Q bone extraction and source-snapshot-backed human safety extraction progress.
Defines the DKD safety extraction boundary supported by the retained PubMed source snapshot.
Defines the AD-risk safety outcome supported by the retained PubMed source snapshot.
Upgrades the legacy IPF safety outcome from triage summary to PubMed source-snapshot-backed abstract extraction.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table diarrhea preferred-term row with blank-control zero-handling.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table nausea preferred-term row with blank-control zero-handling.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table constipation preferred-term row with blank-control zero-handling.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table gastrointestinal reflux preferred-term row with blank-control zero-handling.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table vertigo preferred-term row with blank-control zero-handling.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table fatigue preferred-term row and links it to the withdrawal narrative caveat.
Adds the D+Q bone publication-table body-pain preferred-term row with explicit arm counts and calculated imprecise risk ratio.
Adds registry participant-flow adverse-event discontinuation counts and article withdrawal-narrative provenance for the D+Q and untreated-control arms.
Creates a PubMed source-snapshot-backed DKD safety limitation record where the retained abstract summary does not report adverse-event counts.
Reconciles the legacy IPF generic tolerability result with abstract-located non-serious adverse-event totals, serious-adverse-event relatedness, and sleep/anxiety counts.
Adds the AD-risk abstract-reported absence of serious adverse events related to the D+Q intervention.
Keeps the D+Q bone safety synthesis boundary current after adding preferred-term and discontinuation results while preserving pooling blockers.

promotion.summary: Promoted to accepted after all required active review lanes passed.
